_doc: Rectangles (CSS px, top-left origin, full-page coords) painted out on BOTH sides before diffing, so known-intentional deltas and dynamic content never count. Optional 'viewports' limits a rect to named breakpoints. Coords are refined in Phase 3 against the actual clone capture; Phase 0 ships documented placeholders for the known deltas.

global.note: Scorpion chat dock (Connect/Text/Call/Email) — removed by design, sat bottom-right
AudioEye accessibility widget — removed by design, sat bottom-left

/.note: Quiz card sidebar — our addition (keep), under the attorney video. Mask the band it occupies so the extra element never counts. Refine in Phase 3.
Hero video frame — autoplay frame differs between captures. Mask the hero media box. Refine in Phase 3.

/blogs/.note: Blog post dates/recency drift — original publishes new posts; mask the card date row. Refine in Phase 3.

/blogs/2026/june/recommended-frequency-f.note: Post date / related-posts recency — mask the byline date. Refine in Phase 3.
